quote: Hey Jacki! I really enjoyed the session and presentation from Romit yesterday. Thanks for founding this community! I liked the format a lot. This is the first time I've used some of these voice chat and live event features in Discord. It felt a lot more cozy than a Zoom call normally does.
name: GlowBringer

quote: So fun doing the UX Chat! Love the community you're building, and thanks for having me 😊
name: Kathy Wang

quote: Would love to stay connected for future UX events!
name: Nimisha Malreddy

quote: Hi Jacki, Thank you for sharing your story and putting together UX Chats. It helps so much to know there's a space where we can all connect.
name: Karen Rust

quote: Hi there Jacki, I think what you're doing is great, thank you for hosting virtual meet-ups for designers! Michele said it best, there were lots of golden nuggets given out today.
name: Kara Prado

quote: Thanks so much for connecting, and for the UX Chats! Like I said during the session, I really wasn't expecting it to be so meaningful, but it was exactly what I needed that day. I'm just starting out in this field, and it's definitely been a bit of a rollercoaster. Since we come from a similar background, I'd love to hear more about your journey sometime, if you're ever up for a quick chat. So glad we crossed paths!
name: Victoria Demetrio Rolon

quote: Hey Jacki! I came across your name through Tanya's post about the UX Chat you hosted. I love how you're bringing UX professionals together to share their journeys and support each other. Would love to connect and continue learning from the amazing work you're doing in the community :)
name: Pearl Sequeira
